California Stete University, Los Angeles
Admissions Office

Applicant Name : Hirofumi Suzuki

Confirmation Number: g1019980107419980000011433

I am a applicant for M.A. in Communication Studies, fall 1998.
I had already submitted the online portion of my application and paid application fee.
Enclosed are the rest application materials, which are

International Student Application
Affidavit of Support
Official transcripts

Personal Statement
Resume
Sample of scholarly writing
3 Letters of Recommendation

Hirofumi Suzuki

for

The Master of Arts in Communication Studies

January 14, 1998

ïŋ―iïŋ―ïŋ―ïŋ―ïŋ―ïŋ―ïŋ―ïŋ―ïŋ―{ïŋ―ïŋ―ïŋ―Åïŋ―ïŋ―j
